## Meeting Purpose

[Sales standup to review pipeline, discuss process changes, and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/_T6fS_BT9F4mzPN6sY5S219yqxdYbysp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to establish new process for getting deal updates from Marcel, likely via WhatsApp 2-3x/week](https://fathom.video/share/_T6fS_BT9F4mzPN6sY5S219yqxdYbysp?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Tyler to take lead on newer deals; Kyle to focus on existing deals and transition to client work](https://fathom.video/share/_T6fS_BT9F4mzPN6sY5S219yqxdYbysp?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Team to update all open deals in HubSpot this week, fixing data issues from migration](https://fathom.video/share/_T6fS_BT9F4mzPN6sY5S219yqxdYbysp?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Multiple deals targeting Aug 18th kickoff; need to create urgency and manage capacity](https://fathom.video/share/_T6fS_BT9F4mzPN6sY5S219yqxdYbysp?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)

## Topics

### Pipeline Review

  - [4 potential deals for Aug 18th kickoff: Understory, HockeyStack, Alex (formerly Apriora), LightSource](https://fathom.video/share/_T6fS_BT9F4mzPN6sY5S219yqxdYbysp?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [3 potential deals for Aug 25th: Deep Graham, Viscom, NormAI](https://fathom.video/share/_T6fS_BT9F4mzPN6sY5S219yqxdYbysp?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Redis pushing back on initial SOW pricing; follow-up call scheduled](https://fathom.video/share/_T6fS_BT9F4mzPN6sY5S219yqxdYbysp?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
  - [Lovable (referral from Karilu) interested in moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/_T6fS_BT9F4mzPN6sY5S219yqxdYbysp?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)

### Process Changes

  - [Remove Marcel from regular pipeline meetings; create separate process for high-priority deals](https://fathom.video/share/_T6fS_BT9F4mzPN6sY5S219yqxdYbysp?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Tyler to create tasks in HubSpot for Marcel's action items and follow-ups](https://fathom.video/share/_T6fS_BT9F4mzPN6sY5S219yqxdYbysp?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Implement checklist for new opportunities (create deal, Slack channel, send SOW, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/_T6fS_BT9F4mzPN6sY5S219yqxdYbysp?tab=summary&timestamp=1679.0)
  - [Tyler to take lead on newer deals; Kyle to focus on existing deals and transition to client work](https://fathom.video/share/_T6fS_BT9F4mzPN6sY5S219yqxdYbysp?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### HubSpot Data Cleanup

  - [Kyle and Tyler to review all open deals this week](https://fathom.video/share/_T6fS_BT9F4mzPN6sY5S219yqxdYbysp?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Fix create dates (currently all showing July 25th due to migration)](https://fathom.video/share/_T6fS_BT9F4mzPN6sY5S219yqxdYbysp?tab=summary&timestamp=2085.0)
  - [Ensure all fields are accurate and up-to-date](https://fathom.video/share/_T6fS_BT9F4mzPN6sY5S219yqxdYbysp?tab=summary&timestamp=2101.0)
  - [Create line items for each deal (required to close opportunities)](https://fathom.video/share/_T6fS_BT9F4mzPN6sY5S219yqxdYbysp?tab=summary&timestamp=2063.0)

### Team Updates

  - [Daryl leaving the company](https://fathom.video/share/_T6fS_BT9F4mzPN6sY5S219yqxdYbysp?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Eric starting next Monday, initially in sprints](https://fathom.video/share/_T6fS_BT9F4mzPN6sY5S219yqxdYbysp?tab=summary&timestamp=1946.0)
  - [George now managing both Surge and Augment accounts (\~$400K/month combined)](https://fathom.video/share/_T6fS_BT9F4mzPN6sY5S219yqxdYbysp?tab=summary&timestamp=1969.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler: Take lead on newer deals and Marcel's follow-ups](https://fathom.video/share/_T6fS_BT9F4mzPN6sY5S219yqxdYbysp?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
  - [Bridget: Finalize Surge contract amendment](https://fathom.video/share/_T6fS_BT9F4mzPN6sY5S219yqxdYbysp?tab=summary&timestamp=2032.0)
